prompt: A dark epic Chinese fantasy poster centered on the single gold calligraphy character {argument name="main Chinese character" default="欲"} dominating the upper left, rendered in huge textured brushed gold ink with rough edges and metallic leaf-like highlights. The scene is a cavernous infernal passage in deep black, bronze, and molten amber tones, lit by a blinding sacred glow at the top of a long stone staircase. At the top center-right stands an ornate golden lotus lamp or ritual chalice radiating holy light like a sun halo. In the lower center, show 1 lone ragged human figure from behind, slim and exhausted, wearing tattered dark robes shredded by the wind, reaching one arm upward toward the light while standing on a cracked stone path that becomes stairs. Flowing through the composition are 6 visible crimson silk ribbons or smoke-like fabric strands curling dramatically from left, right, and foreground, adding motion. Carve or inscribe 5 clearly visible Chinese characters onto broken stone slabs along the path and lower foreground: 情, 贪, 嗔, 痴, 慢, each glowing faintly in warm gold. Build the cave walls from writhing organic rock and shadow, with 3 large ghostly human faces emerging from the stone on the left and right sides, as if embodiments of temptation and suffering. Include 2 monstrous clawed hands reaching inward from the lower right toward the traveler. On the left side beneath the large title character, place 1 vertical block of elegant Chinese poem text in small gold calligraphy, plus 1 red seal stamp beside it. Along the bottom margin, add 1 horizontal line of small gold Chinese text with decorative dividers and the central highlighted character 心, plus 1 additional small red seal at the lower right. The overall style is cinematic, ultra-detailed, mythic, spiritual, and ominous, mixing Buddhist allegory, dark fantasy, and premium poster design; volumetric lighting, glowing dust, dramatic contrast, intricate brush typography, high detail, vertical composition.
translatedPrompt: 一张史诗级的暗黑风中国奇幻海报，画面左上方以巨大的金色纹理书法字 {argument name="main Chinese character" default="欲"} 为核心，笔触粗犷，带有金属箔般的质感与高光。场景设定在深邃的洞窟地狱中，色调为深黑、青铜与熔岩琥珀色，长长的石阶尽头闪烁着耀眼的圣光。在右上方的顶端，矗立着一盏华丽的金色莲花灯或祭祀圣杯，散发着如日晕般的圣光。画面下方中央，呈现 1 个孤独且衣衫褴褛的背影，身形消瘦疲惫，穿着被风吹得破烂的深色长袍，正向着光亮处伸出一只手臂，脚下是逐渐演变为台阶的碎裂石径。画面中飘动着 6 条醒目的绯红色丝带或如烟雾般的织物，从左、右及前景处戏剧性地缠绕，增添了动态感。在沿途及下方前景的断裂石板上刻有 5 个清晰可见的汉字：情、贪、嗔、痴、慢，每个字都散发着微弱的暖金色光芒。洞穴墙壁由扭曲的有机岩石与阴影构成，左右两侧的石壁中浮现出 3 张巨大的幽灵人脸，仿佛是诱惑与苦难的化身。在右下方加入 2 只向旅人伸出的狰狞利爪。在左侧大字下方，放置 1 竖排优雅的金色小楷诗词，并在旁边盖上 1 枚红色印章。在底部边缘，添加 1 横排带有装饰性分隔符的金色小字，中心突出“心”字，并在右下角额外添加 1 枚红色小印章。整体风格为电影级、超细节、神话感、灵性且带有不祥之兆，融合了佛教寓言、暗黑奇幻与高端海报设计；包含体积光、发光尘埃、强烈的明暗对比、精致的笔触排版、高细节度及竖构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 暗黑风中国神话“欲”主题海报：此提示词用于生成一张极具戏剧张力的竖版中国神话海报，画面包含巨型书法、向圣物攀登的孤独求道者，以及具有象征意义的石刻铭文，适用于概念艺术或文学海报设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: volumetric]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
